ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the card */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card was created */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the card belongs to */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the card (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the card */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card was last updated */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the comment */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card associated with the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "assigned_user_id" INTEGER /* User assigned to the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time required to complete the task (in minutes) */,
  "actual_time" INTEGER /* Actual time taken to complete the task (in minutes) */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was completed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color assigned to the tag */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the tag */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_tags" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag associated with the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id", "tag_id")
)
